ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "adult" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is for adults only */,
  "belongs_to_collection" TEXT /* Collection the movie belongs to (if any) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Poster path of the movie */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* Production companies involved in the movie */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Production countries involved in the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Spoken languages in the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released, Upcoming) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "video" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie has a video */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total vote count for the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the movie */,
  "crew" TEXT /* Crew members involved in the movie */,
  "trailers" TEXT /* Trailers of the movie */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the movie as favorite */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite movie */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time for the movie */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
